provenance.note: Hand-built explicit-dual reformulation of the pressure-aware incumbent. Calibrates the admission shadow price toward the marginal evicted victim and adds a switching-cost margin (0.9) to control churn. Only the switching margin is tuned (validation sweep); other coefficients are first-guess. Beats the prior incumbent on validation (66.145 vs 65.649), the held-out probe panel (77.177 vs 74.899), and the held-out hidden panel (4.042 vs 3.064) at lower complexity (372 vs 572) and lower churn. Known sensitivity: TinyLFU-LRU overtakes it if the fairness weight is raised to at least 1.5x nominal.
